title: Compliance report
description: Generated artifact produced by running the policy bundle over the versioned state. It is never hand-edited: it is regenerated from control-state.json through the documented build command, so adding an asset or exception to the state updates the report without any change to policy source.

source_state.description: Filename of the state the report was generated from.

reference_time.description: The state's generated_at value. All expiry and freshness comparisons use this rather than wall-clock time, so the report is reproducible.

controls_evaluated.description: The three assigned control outcomes. Exactly three, per the board constraint.

reportEntry.title: Report entry
reportEntry.description: One decision with its provenance. asset_locator and evidence_locator are JSON-pointer references into the source state, so every reported outcome can be traced to the exact position it was derived from.

asset_locator.description: Source file and JSON pointer, e.g. control-state.json#/storage/1

evidence_locator.description: The raw locator backing this decision, used to reconcile against evidence-index.csv.
